  extension-registration, backend-event, stores-versioning, embedded-script,
  service-plugin)
- Extract dashboard-page layout guidelines (~180 lines) to references/LAYOUT_GUIDELINES.md

  explanations of why each step matters

- Add missing Site Component to orchestrator decision tables

- Add dashboard extension chooser (page vs modal vs plugin) to dashboard-page
- Standardize verification section wording across all skills

commit.message:
Add NF system design for IER regenerant chemical recovery

Comprehensive engineering design document (ICH-NF-IER-DES-001) for
nanofiltration-based recovery of NaOH and HCl from ion exchange resin
regeneration waste. Covers membrane selection (Koch MPS-34, Mann+Hummel
NP030, Veolia Duracid), process flow, equipment sizing at 3 scales
(100/500/1000 m³/d), CAPEX/OPEX analysis, and sugar/sweetener industry
applications with real commercial case studies.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: caustic-acid-recovery-nf
repository.description: NF System Design for IER Regenerant Chemical Recovery — Engineering design document for nanofiltration-based recovery of NaOH and HCl from ion exchange resin regeneration waste

commit.message:
Fix CI: add OTP email verification and TESTMAIL_API_KEY env var

BaseTest.doLogin() now handles Salesforce email OTP by polling the
testmail.app API via Java HttpURLConnection when the post-login URL
doesn't contain /lightning/. Session is cached to session.json after
the first successful login so subsequent tests in the same run skip
re-login. ci.yml passes TESTMAIL_API_KEY secret to the mvn verify step.

commit.message:
feat: multi-account support — reinitialize observer on account switch

The background translation observer was initialized once with the first
account's context and never updated on account switch. This broke
real-time background translation for any non-first account.

Now startIfNeeded detects account switches via peerId comparison, tears
down the old observer (disposing notificationMessages subscription),
clears stale in-flight/catch-up tracking, and creates a fresh observer
for the new account. Also adds catchUpAllUnreadChats to translate
recent messages across top 50 chats on the newly active account.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Revamp CSV imports, collections model, targets attainment, churn risk

Opportunities:
- Add CSV import (↑ Import CSV) with columns: Opportunity Name, AM Name,
  Client Name, Expected Close Month, Close Year, Total Deal Size, Status,
  Quarter, Notes; plus ↓ Template download
- Add Notes field to Add/Edit deal form and table
- Remove Deal Type column from table (simplified)

Collections:
- New CSV format: Date, Customer Name, Amount, TDS Amount, Inv Amount, GST,
  Total Amount, Upsell/Crossell (Y/N flag)
- AM and CSM auto-filled from linked account by Customer Name lookup
- Incentive split: Upsell=Y → upsell_amount=Total Amount;
  Upsell=N → regular_amount=Total Amount
- Store all new fields: tds_amount, gst_amount, total_amount, upsell_flag,
  collection_date, inv_amount
- Updated collection list table: Date, Customer, AM, CSM, Upsell badge,
  Total Amount, TDS, GST, Period columns

Targets:
- Add CSV import (↑ Import CSV) with columns: Rep Name, Rep Type, FY,
  Quarter, Target Amount, Threshold %, Accelerator %, Cap Amount
- Targets page: show "Achieved (Won Opps)" column auto-computed from
  Closed Won opportunities for that rep/FY/quarter
- Attainment % based on Won deals vs allocated target with progress bar

Labels:
- Dashboard "At-Risk Accounts" → "Churn Risk"
- Accounts page "At Risk" → "Churn Risk"

commit.message:
fix: strip NODE_ENV=production from worktree child processes

The container sets NODE_ENV=production for the Hive app, but this leaks
into npm commands run in target-repo worktrees, causing devDependencies
to be skipped. This breaks postinstall scripts (patch-package) and build
tools (vite) that live in devDependencies.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Add keyword tracking onboarding, ranking progress chart, and history logs

Onboarding:
- First-visit modal asks users to enter 3-5 keywords to track
- Skippable, auto-dismissed if keywords already exist
- Immediately triggers AI position estimates after setup

Dashboard ranking chart:
- New "Keyword Rankings" widget showing all tracked keywords
- Sparkline bar chart per keyword (height = rank quality, colour-coded)
- Improvement/drop indicators (↑ improved / ↓ dropped)
- Shows "Add keywords" prompt if none tracked yet
- "Refresh" button triggers new AI estimate, updates chart

Keyword research history:
- Every search saved to cruise_kw_history (query, date, vol, difficulty)
- "Recent searches" section in Keywords view with one-click re-search
- Clearable history (up to 20 entries saved)

Site Audit history log:
- Full audit data saved to cruise_audit_log on every run (up to 24 entries)
- "Audit history" table in Site Audit view with score, errors, warnings, pages
- Score change column (green +delta / red -delta) to show trend over time

Rank log:
- Position history per keyword saved to cruise_rank_log on every estimate
- Up to 12 data points per keyword (replaces same-day entries)
- Used to power sparkline chart on dashboard

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix post_score.py: handle both 'scores' and 'dimensions' keys

Claude outputs 'dimensions' instead of 'scores' and omits 'weight'
per dimension. Script now falls back to known DIMENSION_WEIGHTS when
weight is missing, and accepts either key name.

commit.message:
feat: add BYOK (Bring Your Own Key) support for Anthropic API (#11)

Users can now save their own Anthropic API key via the Settings page.
The key is encrypted with Fernet and stored in Supabase. All consumer
services (agents, YouTube summarizer, skill factory) resolve the user
key at call time, falling back to the server default if none is set.

Co-authored-by: Heina <heina@example.com>

改进发票金额和号码的识别逻辑，解决不同格式发票的识别问题：

- 调整金额匹配优先级，优先匹配大写金额后的小写金额
- 支持多种发票格式（运输服务、成品油、地铁等）
- 改进发票号码识别，支持换行和多种布局
- 添加20位独立数字的备用匹配逻辑
- 优化正则表达式，提高识别准确率

测试通过的发票类型：
- 运输服务发票（价税合计在大写金额后）
- 地铁发票（价税合计格式特殊）
- 成品油发票（标准格式）

commit.message:
fix: admin slicer crash — null values from CuraEngine G-code parsing (v5.28.2)

CuraEngine G-code uses different comment formats (`;Filament used: Xm`,
`;Generated with`) that the parser didn't recognise, returning null for
weight/time. The SlicerResults component called .toFixed() on null,
crashing React and showing the 500 error page.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add admin-panel bot stress test system

New BotManager creates bot accounts, connects via socket.io-client,
and orchestrates configurable game rounds with random moves, resign/draw
endings, and spectator behavior. Admin panel UI provides config controls,
start/stop buttons, and a live activity log polling every 2s. All bot
data (users, games) is purged from DB on stop.

redirect_slashes allows both forms to work.

  (ensures real functions load BEFORE helper-stubs.R runs alphabetically)
- Add existence checks to all stub functions in helper-stubs.R to
  prevent overwriting real implementations

  graphical_ses_ai_classifier.R by using standard R validation
- Add missing filter_by_confidence function to network_analysis.R
- Move DEBUG_MODE and debug_log earlier in global.R initialization

  - CONFIDENCE_OPACITY value (0.85 → 0.9)
  - Regional seas count (12 → 13)

  - Warning/debug output expectations for production mode

* Add missing startFirstSceneByPush function

startFirstSceneByPush was called in the join handler but never defined,
causing ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND on Render. Added it as a variant of
startFirstSceneByPushWithTarget without user name targeting (used when
no specific parent is known yet at join time).

handlers/join.js imports startFirstSceneByPush from logic/ but the file

https://claude.ai/code/session_01MrKbmjNmnqXJPg1qFWVv41

import { generaten } from "./ai/generaten.js" was causing
ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND on Render. The correct import is generateReflection
from ./ai/generateReflection.js.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01MrKbmjNmnqXJPg1qFWVv41

* fix: correct supabase access in startFirstSceneByPush.js

- Replace dynamic import with static import for supabase client
- Fix supabase.supabase.from() -> supabase.from() (double-access bug)

https://claude.ai/code/session_01MrKbmjNmnqXJPg1qFWVv41

* feat: add mention support for LINE push messages

- Add src/line/pushMention.js: push message with @mention
- Add src/line/pushQuickMention.js: push quick reply with @mention
- Update startFirstSceneByPush to mention first user (A or B)
- Update startFirstSceneByPushWithTarget message text
- Update server.js vision_choice to use pushQuickMention for next user

https://claude.ai/code/session_01MrKbmjNmnqXJPg1qFWVv41

* fix: セッション初期化を await の前に移動してメンション競合状態を修正

memberJoined イベントが replyText の await 中に session.parents.A を
セットしても、handleJoin 再開後に上書きされてしまう競合状態を修正。
session.parents の初期化を await replyText より前に移動することで、
memberJoined が正しく A を登録できるようにした。

https://claude.ai/code/session_01MrKbmjNmnqXJPg1qFWVv41

* fix: グループメンバーのLINEプロフィール取得をグループ用エンドポイントに変更

/v2/bot/profile/{userId} はフォロー済みユーザー専用のため
グループ内ユーザーで Not Found になっていた。
groupId を渡すことで /v2/bot/group/{groupId}/member/{userId} を使い、
正しい表示名でメンションできるようにした。

https://claude.ai/code/session_01MrKbmjNmnqXJPg1qFWVv41

* fix: メッセージ処理エラーを修正しフロー全体を堅牢化

- saveMessage のエラーを throw→log に変更（DB保存失敗で会話が止まる問題を修正）
- handleWebhookEvents の catch ブロックで err.message を表示するよう改善
- scene_emotion/value_norm_choice/background_choice/vision_choice の各フェーズで
  Claude API エラー時にフォールバックメッセージを返しフェーズを巻き戻す
- vision_choice の遷移フェーズ名を "n" から "finishing" に変更

https://claude.ai/code/session_01MrKbmjNmnqXJPg1qFWVv41

* feat: 「再開」キーワードで直前のbot発言を再送する機能を追加

- 各フェーズ（scene_emotion / value_norm_choice / background_choice / vision_choice）
  でbotが送ったメッセージをsession.lastBotMessageに保存
- ユーザーが「再開」と送ると lastBotMessage をクイックリプライ付きで再送
- saveMessage や turn switch の前に判定するためフロー中断なし

https://claude.ai/code/session_01MrKbmjNmnqXJPg1qFWVv41

* feat: sessionsテーブルへのDB永続化を実装

- sessionManager: startSession/endSession を async 化し Supabase sessions テーブルへ insert/update
- saveSession(): フェーズ変化時にセッション状態を DB へ保存
- loadSessionFromDB(): サーバー再起動後に「再開」で DB からセッションを復元
- server.js: 各フェーズ完了後に saveSession を呼び出し、テキスト受信時に loadSessionFromDB でセッション復元を試みる
- startFirstSceneByPush.js: lastBotMessage 設定後に saveSession を呼び出し
- handlers/join.js: startSession を await に変更

https://claude.ai/code/session_01MrKbmjNmnqXJPg1qFWVv41

* feat: Step3深掘り機能を実装(最大3ターン)

- src/ai/generateStep3Deep.js を新規作成
  - generateStep3_2Question/Options: エピソード具体化の質問・選択肢生成
  - generateStep3_3Question/Options: 感情を掘る質問・選択肢生成
  - 選択肢は動的生成3つ + 「もう十分思い出した、次に進みたい」固定
- src/server.js を修正
  - generateStep3Deep.js のインポート追加
  - background_choice: Step3-2へ進むか、脱出でStep4へ
  - background_choice_deep2: Step3-3へ進むか、脱出でStep4へ
  - background_choice_deep3: Step4へ進む
  - vision_choice: step3Deepening データをリフレクションに渡す
  - 2人目ターン開始時に step3Deepening をリセット
- src/ai/generateReflection.js を修正
  - backgroundDetail(Step3-2回答)・backgroundEmotion(Step3-3回答)パラメータ追加
  - 深掘り情報がある場合は具体的なエピソードと感情をリフレクションに織り込む

https://claude.ai/code/session_01MrKbmjNmnqXJPg1qFWVv41

* feat: Step1選択肢をSupabaseからClaude API動的生成に変更

- src/ai/generateStep1.js を新規作成
  - generateStep1Options: シナリオに対する自然な想い・考えを3つ生成
  - 感情ラベルではなく「自立の一歩だと思う」のような具体的な想い
- src/logic/startFirstSceneByPush.js を修正
  - getStep1Options(Supabase) → generateStep1Options(Claude API)
  - startFirstSceneByPush / startFirstSceneByPushWithTarget 両関数で適用
- src/server.js を修正
  - getStep1Options → generateStep1Options に置換
  - 2人目のターン開始時も新たに生成(B案: 毎回新鮮な選択肢)

https://claude.ai/code/session_01MrKbmjNmnqXJPg1qFWVv41

- session.parents / firstSpeaker / firstUser の状態をログ出力
- firstSpeaker キーでまず親を取得するよう修正（A固定から改善）

commit.message:
fix: cap rehash growth with MAX_GROWTHS=10 to prevent unbounded recursion

All three hash table classes had unbounded recursion in their rehash
paths — if 10 seed attempts failed, they doubled capacity and recursed
with no base case. Converted to bounded loops with a hard limit of 10
capacity doublings before throwing IllegalStateException.

Also fixes a latent data-loss bug in StandardCuckooHashTable where the
recursive rehash() re-saved partially-filled garbage tables as the
"old" data source instead of preserving the original tables.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

ci: fix PR number resolution with artifact fallback (#1408)

github.event.workflow_run.pull_requests[0].number can be empty when
GitHub cannot resolve the PR association (e.g., head and base branch
share the same name). This caused the comment step to fail on PR #1405.

Use event context when available, fall back to artifact pr_number file.
All downstream steps reference steps.meta.outputs.pr_number.

commit.message:
Add admin pipeline jobs controls with live monitoring

- New API: /api/admin/pipeline-jobs (GET list, POST actions)
- Actions: pause, resume, cancel, restart, retry_failed, force_complete
- Resume auto-detects which pipeline step to continue from
- Pipeline jobs section added above connections table in admin dashboard
- Job cards show per-step progress bars, timing, stats, action buttons
- Completed jobs show compact view with restart option
- Error log modal for viewing JSONB error entries
- Auto-refreshes every 10 seconds for live progress

fix(trans.sh): also pre-create instance symlink in setup_nocloud()

The instance symlink fix was only in download_cloud_init_config().
setup_nocloud() is a separate code path that also needs the fix.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add Ctrl+S force save to database (#109)

## Summary

- Extend y-websocket binary protocol with `MSG_FORCE_SAVE = 4` for
manual save trigger
- Collab server: flush pending debounced save + persist to Supabase on
force-save request, reply with success/error byte
- Frontend: `useForceSave` hook handles Ctrl+S / Cmd+S, sends binary WS
message, shows "Saving..." → "Saved." / "Save failed." in status bar
- StatusBar: add `error` message type with red `AlertCircle` icon and
red text
- i18n: add `save.saving`, `save.saved`, `save.failed`,
`save.notConnected` keys (en + en-SG)
- Edge cases: WS disconnected → immediate error, rapid Ctrl+S → ignored
while in-flight, 5s timeout → error flash

## Test plan

- [x] `useForceSave` — 9 unit tests (Ctrl+S, Cmd+S, saving state,
success/error responses, in-flight guard, disconnected, null provider,
timeout, re-save)
- [x] `StatusBar` — 2 new tests for error type (icon + red styling)
- [x] `useStatusMessage` — 1 new test for error type flash
- [x] Build passes (`bun run build`)
- [x] All 1861 unit tests pass (`bun run test:run`)
- [x] All 39 e2e tests pass (`bun run test:e2e`)
- [x] Lint clean (`bun run lint`)
- [x] Prettier clean (`bunx prettier --check .`)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add dashboard-internal snippet pages for inline docs

Per-platform code snippet pages used by the dashboard's No-Code Builder
onboarding wizard and other inline doc components. These pages are not
in the navigation config — they're only fetched by the dashboard.

- 8 install-no-codes-* pages (per-platform SDK installation)
- 7 initialize-sdks* pages (per-platform SDK initialization)
- 7 display-no-code-screen* pages (per-platform screen display)
- context-specific-experiments-drawer (AB testing explainer)
- subscription-ab-testing (experiments overview)
- realtime (monitoring metrics)

commit.message:
fix(kospi): RSPI 데이터 파이프라인 수정 — 야간 change_pct 수집 + D1 활성화

- fetch_daily.py: yfinance 시작일 7일 전 확장 (전일 종가 lookback 확보)
- fetch_daily.py: break를 if pd.notna() 안쪽으로 이동 (NaN 거래일 skip 방지)
- compute_models.py: overnight_data D-1~D-3 역추적 (당일 None 시 최근 유효 레코드 사용)
- RSPI 결과: D1 0.0→11.0 (EWY+1.53%, KORU+4.38%, SPY+0.70% 반영), RSPI -27.0 (none)
